title: saterminal preferences
description: Local preferences for SAT practice and answer review.

$schema.description: Editor schema association. Managed by saterminal.

review.description: Spacing requirements for missed and corrected questions.

minimumDays.description: Days before a question becomes eligible for review.

minimumAnswersAfter.description: Later answers required before a question becomes eligible for review.

display.description: Controls learner-facing information in the terminal interface.

resultDetail.description: Answer-result context: brief shows time; standard adds difficulty; detailed adds taxonomy codes and labels.
